## [00:00 - 00:38]

All right, it's 270 days. This is called the chocolate boot candy gimmick. I want you to send the buyer a giant chocolate boot candy with a note. I need to get my foot back in the door. Yeah, it's a gimmick. Yeah, it's a little weird. You might not like it, but it doesn't matter if you do. Again, we're just trying to be that stream that wears out that rock over time. 270 days. Use some kind of gimmick here. Chocolate boot candy would be perfect. Costs you $2.50. Google it. You'll find it. Send it out to personal note. I'll see you at 30 days before this chocolate melts.
